sellers_note: Experience the pinnacle of American sports car performance with this stunning 2023 Chevrolet Corvette Stingray 2LT. Meticulously maintained and boasting just 3,925 miles, this Corvette is a true driver's dream.- SEATS, GT2 BUCKET- STEALTH INTERIOR TRIM PACKAGE- FRONT LIFT ADJUSTABLE HEIGHT WITH MEMORY- CALIPERS, BRIGHT RED-PAINTED- EXHAUST TIPS, BLACK- WHEELS, 19'' X 8.5'' FRONT AND 20'' X 11'' REAR 5-TRIDENT-SPOKE MACHINED-FACE SPECTRA GRAY-PAINTED ALUMINUM- Z51 PERFORMANCE PACKAGE- CARBON FLASH METALLIC-PAINTED OUTSIDE MIRRORS AND SPOILEROutfitted with a potent 6.2L V8 engine mated to an 8-speed dual clutch transmission, this Corvette delivers exhilarating performance with an EPA-estimated 16 city/24 highway MPG. The Z51 Performance Package takes this Stingray to the next level, adding enhanced brakes, suspension, exhaust, and an electronic limited-slip differential for unparalleled handling.Climb inside and you'll be greeted by a wealth of premium features, including a Bose 14-speaker audio system, heads-up display, heated and ventilated seats, wireless charging, and more. The Stealth Interior Trim Package adds a sophisticated dark aluminum accent finish, while the Memory Driver & Passenger Convenience Package ensures a personalized driving experience.Whether carving through canyon roads or cruising the boulevard, this 2023 Chevrolet Corvette Stingray 2LT is a true automotive masterpiece. Experience the thrill of owning one of the most iconic sports cars on the road. Schedule your test drive today.Price does not include licensing costs, registration fees, and taxes which are to be paid by the consumer. Prices include $999 dealer doc fee. At Prestige BMW, we strive to make every customer a customer for life. Our long-standing reputation throughout the Northeast is a testament to the dedication of each and every one of our employees. From sales to service, we pride ourselves on having one of the most distinguished lines of vehicles available. Come in for a test drive and you will see what we mean. Documentation fee: $999
